pureFuturesArbitrage._venuesNote: perp DEX 'aster' and 'lighter' are also supported (scan + trade)
pureFuturesArbitrage._feeRatesNote: optional per-venue taker override (%); omit to fetch per-symbol rates from exchange APIs
pureFuturesArbitrage._depthNote: depthCheckFailOpen=false blocks opens when the order book fetch fails (recommended for thin DEX books)
